title: Waste Management 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary filing for WM business segments, strategy, risks, and 2025 operating context.

title: WM Waste Management & Recycling Services
note: Company service page covering residential, commercial, roll-off, support, pickup schedule, and recycling education entry points.

title: Residential Waste Services
note: Product source for WM residential trash, recycling, bulk pickup, dumpster, electronic waste, hazardous waste, and community services.

title: Highlights from WM's 2025 Sustainability Report
note: Summarizes WM's recycling and renewable natural gas infrastructure investment context and sustainability metrics.

title: Waste Management Financials
note: Financial data source for FY 2025 revenue, net income, margins, and free cash flow.

title: Waste Management Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization source showing WM market cap and global rank as of May 2026.

title: Waste Management P/E Ratio
note: Market data source for WM trailing P/E ratio as of May 2026.

title: Open Source at Our Core
note: Documents the open-source GraphHopper routing engine and jsprit vehicle-routing solver relevant to decentralized collection routing.

title: SwolfPy GitHub Repository
note: Open-source municipal solid waste life-cycle assessment and optimization framework for comparing waste-system alternatives.

title: Optimizing Waste Management Collection Routes in Urban Haiti
note: Research example showing open-source tools such as OpenStreetMap and OR-Tools applied to waste collection routing problems.

title: Precious Plastic
note: Open-hardware community recycling model relevant to local plastic reuse and microfactory concepts.
